win_condition: When game end is triggered, each player totals VP in their full deck/discard/hand/in-play; highest VP wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with fewer turns wins; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Victory Cards
categories.description: VP from Estate/Duchy/Province/Colony and any Kingdom Victory cards.

categories.label: Curse Cards
categories.description: Each Curse card is worth -1 VP.

categories.label: VP Tokens and Effects
categories.description: Any VP tokens and card effects that grant victory points.
